data.title: Encryption at Rest and in Transit
data.description: Ensuring data privacy and protection using encryption techniques.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data storage; TLS for data in transit.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Utilizing AI and machine learning to identify and mitigate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: AWS GuardDuty, AWS Macie for monitoring and anomaly detection.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strict IAM policies to control access to resources.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM roles and permissions policies.

data.title: DDoS Resilience
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield, CDN services for traffic absorption.

data.title: Patch Management
data.description: Regularly updating and patching systems to protect against vulnerabilities.
